About Us

Our Story

Our Mission & Vision

Mission: To accelerate the global transition to sustainable EV transportation by delivering world-class charging infrastructure that is intelligent, reliable, and accessible.

Vision: A future where charging electric vehicles is as simple as traditional refueling, powered by renewable energy and managed by AI-driven networks.

50+

Expert Engineers

500+

Active Installations

20+

Countries Served

9+

Years Experience

Values

Our Core Values

These principles guide every decision we make and every product we build.

💡

Innovation

Constantly pushing boundaries of charging technology and efficiency

🌱

Sustainability

Committed to reducing carbon footprint and enabling green mobility

⚙️

Reliability

99.9% uptime guarantee with 24/7 customer support globally

⭐

Excellence

Uncompromising quality in every product and service we deliver

History

Milestones & Achievements

🚀
2015

Founded

EV Fast Charging established with vision to revolutionize EV infrastructure

⚡
2017

First Station

Deployed first ultra-fast DC charging station in Asia-Pacific

🌍
2019

Global Expansion

Reached 20+ countries across multiple continents

📜
2021

180+ Patents

Achieved 180+ intellectual property certifications worldwide

👑
2023

Market Leader

Recognized as industry leader in fast charging technology

🤖
2024

AI Innovation

Launched AI-powered charging management platform

Leadership
